induction_input: The cake the chef baked disappeared.
The book the student read vanished.
The report the manager signed circulated.
The dog the child chased escaped.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
induced_prompt_raw: Write sentences using center-embedded relative clauses, where a main noun is modified by a "the [agent] [verb]ed" clause, followed by a single intransitive main verb.
induced_prompt: Write sentences using center-embedded relative clauses, where a main noun is modified by a "the [agent] [verb]ed" clause, followed by a single intransitive main verb.
l2_sentences: The cat the dog chased ran.
The book the scholar borrowed disappeared.
The cake the chef baked vanished.
The deer the hunter spotted fled.
The letter the spy wrote surfaced.
l1_sentences: The cake the chef baked disappeared.
The book the student read vanished.
The report the manager signed circulated.
The dog the child chased escaped.
